# beyondcompare-mcp

MCP server for file and directory comparison via Beyond Compare engine. Compare files/folders, synchronize directories, generate diff reports, and manage developer workspaces.

> Full reference: [llms-full.txt](llms-full.txt)

## Key Tools
- **File & folder comparison** — diff two files/directories via Beyond Compare engine
- **Directory sync** — mirror, update, and backup synchronization modes
- **Diff reports** — multi-format comparison reports (HTML, text)
- **Workspace tools** — repo backup, health scanning, workspace analysis
- **Code analysis** — duplicate code detection, workspace snapshot comparison
- **Cleanup** — artifact cleanup with `node_modules` filtering

## Ports
| Port | Service |
|------|---------|
| 10840 | Dashboard frontend (Vite) |
| 10841 | Dashboard API (FastAPI) |

## Quick Start
```bash
uv sync && uv run beyondcompare-mcp
```
